title: Indian private equity: Evolving legal landscape
description: Private equity has been in India for about three decades. During this time, the PE ecosystem has evolved and matured considerably. In the last several years the generally agreed legal positions are seeing a change and new constructs are entering the deal documents. In this article we will see some of the key positions that are changing, keeping the early stage deals at the heart of the discussion.1.
